data.title: What's Going On With Rivian (RIVN) Stock?
data.description: Rivian Automotive shares are trading lower by 2.7% during Tuesday's session. Analyst Mickey Legg of Benchmark on Monday initiated coverage with a Buy rating.

data.title: Why Is Rigetti Computing Stock Gaining On Tuesday?
data.description: Rigetti Computing's stock is up after achieving a breakthrough in AI-powered quantum computer calibration, enhancing accuracy and speed.

data.title: What's Going On With Nikola Stock?
data.description: Nikola shares are trading lower by some 11% over the trailing week to $1.50. The company early Monday announced an Equity Distribution Agreement with BTIG to sell up to $100 million of common stock.
